positive: A mesmerizing, highly detailed celestial botanical diagram, featuring stylized crescent moons, intricate roots, blooming cosmic flora, and constellations formed by delicate gold lines. The style is a fusion of vintage scientific illustration (19th-century engraving) and minimalist linocut art. The composition is central and symmetrical, allowing for clean placement on apparel. Use a limited palette of deep indigo blue, aged parchment cream, emerald green, and touches of metallic gold ink. Strong, defined silhouettes, high contrast, and intricate cross-hatching details. The overall feel is mystical, scientific, and elegant.
